info.title: The Bullpen API
info.description: Self-hosted baseball analytics: calibrated pitch-outcome and batted-ball predictions served in-process via ONNX Runtime, wrapped in a model registry with A/B routing and drift detection. Public read + predict endpoints are rate-limited; /v1/admin/** requires ADMIN basic auth.

tags.name: Admin: Experiments
tags.description: ADMIN-authed experiment lifecycle: declare, evaluate, complete, abort, and import offline promotion-gate evidence. Requires HTTP Basic (SecurityConfig /v1/admin/**).

tags.name: Ops dashboard
tags.description: Public read API behind the Ops dashboard: drift metrics, A/B routing, retrain queue, recent ops events, latency, and calibration + accuracy scorecards. No auth (decision [29]); returns empty rather than 404 for speculative polling.

tags.name: Admin: Registry
tags.description: ADMIN-authed model registry writes: list versions, register a model (feature-schema-hash gated), and promote/transition stage (rule-5 promotion gate on CHAMPION). Requires HTTP Basic (SecurityConfig /v1/admin/**).

tags.name: Registry (read)
tags.description: Public read-side of the model registry: model names, versions, stages, and schema hashes. No auth (decision [29], non-sensitive); lists return empty rather than 404 for speculative dashboard polling.

tags.name: Admin: Retraining
tags.description: ADMIN-authed retraining queue: manual enqueue, list/fetch/cancel triggers, and the worker claim/complete/reap-stale lifecycle. Requires HTTP Basic (SecurityConfig /v1/admin/**).

tags.name: Admin: Routing
tags.description: ADMIN-authed A/B routing writes: set/clear challenger, move the traffic slider, and flip SHADOW <-> AB mode. Requires HTTP Basic (SecurityConfig /v1/admin/**).

post.description: Serves the registered pitch-outcome model for the given pre-pitch (and, for head=post, post-pitch) features and returns the calibrated 5-class distribution plus its argmax. Pre and post are two separate registered models (rule 9); 503 when the requested head has no LIVE champion.

parameters.name: head
parameters.description: Which head to serve: 'pre' (pre-pitch, default) or 'post' (post-pitch, which requires the Tier 4 fields).

200.description: Calibrated outcome distribution with the serving model identity.

400.description: Invalid request: validation failed, malformed JSON, or a bad path/query value.

405.description: HTTP method not allowed for this path.

415.description: Unsupported request media type - send application/json.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded - back off and retry after the Retry-After interval.

503.description: The model or a required dependency is temporarily unavailable.

post.summary: Predict P(home run) for a batted ball at one park
post.description: Runs the batted-ball model for the given launch parameters at the requested park and logs the prediction asynchronously. Routing fans out to champion + any shadow via the A/B router.

200.description: Predicted home-run probability with the serving model identity.

400.description: Invalid request: validation failed, malformed JSON, or a bad path/query value.

405.description: HTTP method not allowed for this path.

415.description: Unsupported request media type - send application/json.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded - back off and retry after the Retry-After interval.

503.description: The model or a required dependency is temporarily unavailable.

post.summary: Predict per-park outcome distribution for a batted ball
post.description: Runs the real per-park outcome model once and returns P(home run) for the launch parameters at each of the 30 MLB parks, plus per-park carry feet when the champion has a carry head. Serves the registry LIVE champion; 503 when none is live.

200.description: Per-park home-run probabilities (and optional carry feet) with model identity.

mcTrials.description: Monte-Carlo trial count; null for the analytical method.

servingMode.description: How the model was served. Always "unrouted-diagnostic": the simulator pins one artifact and calls it directly (NOT through the A/B router), because the per-state Markov solve requires every probe to come from the same model version - routing could stitch a mid-request promotion/flip across states.

registryStage.description: The served model's registry stage (e.g. "shadow"), or null when the pinned artifact has no matching registry row. Informational: the simulator serves the pinned artifact directly regardless of stage.

scoreDiff.description: Score differential from the pitching team's view, -30..30.

pitcherThrows.description: Pitcher throwing hand: L or R.

batterStand.description: Batter stand: L or R (resolve switch hitters upstream).

pitcherPitchesLast28d.description: Optional Tier 3 form: pitcher pitches thrown in the last 28 days.

pitchType.description: Tier 4 (post-pitch): pitch type code. Required when head=post.

winner.description: Argmax class label of the distribution.

correlationId.description: Request correlation id echoed back for log tracing.

launchSpeedMph.description: Exit velocity off the bat, mph.

releaseSpeedMph.description: Speed of the pitch that was hit, mph.

stand.description: Batter stand: L or R (resolve switch hitters upstream).

probHr.description: Predicted probability of a home run, 0-1.

correlationId.description: Request correlation id echoed back for log tracing.

launchSpeedMph.description: Exit velocity off the bat, mph.

sprayAngleDeg.description: Horizontal spray angle, degrees (- pull, + oppo).

stand.description: Batter stand: L or R (resolve switch hitters upstream).

additionalProperties.description: Per-park P(home run), keyed by 3-letter park id (30 entries).

probHrByPark.description: Per-park P(home run), keyed by 3-letter park id (30 entries).

additionalProperties.description: Per-park predicted carry distance in feet; null (and omitted) for a probabilities-only champion.

carryFtByPark.description: Per-park predicted carry distance in feet; null (and omitted) for a probabilities-only champion.

correlationId.description: Request correlation id echoed back for log tracing.
Request correlation id for log tracing.

ApiError.description: Canonical error envelope returned by every non-2xx response.
